rule.description: Bitdefender GravityZone: AntiMalware event reported on $(DeviceHostName).
CRITICAL: Bitdefender GravityZone: Malware "$(MalwareName)" is $(gravityzone_action) on $(DeviceHostName)! File: $(FilePath)
Bitdefender GravityZone: New Incident detected on $(DeviceHostName) - $(DetectionName).
Bitdefender GravityZone: Incident "$(DetectionName)" was blocked on $(DeviceHostName). Process: $(sproc)
CRITICAL: Bitdefender GravityZone: Incident "$(DetectionName)" was NOT blocked (Action: $(gravityzone_main_action)) on $(DeviceHostName).
Bitdefender GravityZone: Endpoint $(DeviceHostName) reported module status.
WARNING: Bitdefender GravityZone: A critical security module is DISABLED on $(DeviceHostName).
WARNING: Bitdefender GravityZone: A critical security module is DISABLED on $(DeviceHostName).
WARNING: Bitdefender GravityZone: A critical security module is DISABLED on $(DeviceHostName).
